title: No Lunge Cooldown
description: Removes cooldown from spears having lunge enchantment
body:
The "Lunge" enchantment allows you to dash when you left click. However, it also comes with a cooldown. This datapack removes the cooldown so you can strike immediately.

---

### Features

-  Removes cooldown on spears with **Lunge** enchant
-  Attack without any delay
-  Smoother combat experience
-  Lightweight datapack

---

##  Compatibility

- ✔️ Minecraft **1.21.11**
- ✔️ Compatible with almost all datapacks

---

##  How to Install

1. Download the datapack  
2. Place it in the datapacks folder in your world  
3. Reload the world using `/reload` command  

---

##  Notes

- Only removes the cooldown on spears with the **Lunge** enchant
- The dash functionality still works correctly
- This datapack only removes the cooldown on spears with the **Lunge** enchant
